chunks.text: Baiyu Chen awarded top prize at Infrastructure Vision 2050 Challenge - EECS at Berkeley CS graduate student Baiyu Chen (advisor: Alexei Efros) and Anthony Barrs were awarded top prize and $50,000 for their design at the Infrastructure Vision 2050 Challenge . Their idea, profiled in an article for Fortune , was to construct a “Hyperlane,” or a single platform the size of four interstate lanes that would run parallel to pre-existing highways in order for self-driving cars to travel at high speeds with no chance of getting into a jam. Categories Honors Industry Research Students View Open Faculty Positions
